title: Teen Titans Go! Vs. Teen Titans
subTitle: The Master of Games, a villain who travels through the multiverse, abducts the Teen Titans in order to take over the world. He soon pits them against another version of themselves to destroy Earth.

subTitle: When Teen Titans travel to Hollywood in a bid to make their own movie, a cunning villain takes advantage of the situation and plans to take over Earth.

subTitle: Lex Luthor uses an ancient Kryptonian power to unite the supervillains and capture all superheroes except the DC Super Hero Girls. The girls then team up with the Teen Titans to save the day.
